    • Method Detail

      • makeLine

        public ij.ImagePlus makeLine(ij.ImagePlus imp,
                             int x0,
                             int y0,
                             int z0,
                             int x1,
                             int y1,
                             int z1,
                             int val,
                             int r)
        Main processing method for the Line3D_ object
        Parameters:
        imp - Image where the line has to be created in
        x0 - starting x coordinate
        y0 - starting y coordinate
        z0 - starting z coordinate
        x1 - end x coordinate
        y1 - end y coordinate
        z1 - end x coordinate
        val - pixel value to set
        r - radius
        Returns:
        get the image with one 3D line segment added
